page_metadata.biotools__summary: ccNetViz is a lightweight, high-performance JavaScript library for large network graphs visualization using WebGL. It enables custom styling of nodes and edges in CSS like way, curve edges, dynamic changes of the network, force-directed layout and basic graph interactivity.
